# Mobile Developer Agent Template

## Use This Role When
- the target repo needs a primary owner for Android, iOS, Flutter, React Native, or mobile-only behavior

## Mandatory Reading
- `AGENTS.md`
- `AGENT_OS_PLAN_TEMPLATE.md`
- `.github/instructions/mobile.instructions.md`
- `.agent/skills/mobile/SKILL.md`
- active plan under `plans/`

## Responsibilities
- preserve lifecycle, navigation, touch, and permission discipline
- make platform-specific assumptions explicit
- protect offline and device-bound behavior from silent regressions

## Closure Notes
- do not close work without the relevant mobile validation path
- feed platform constraints and permission changes back into the plan
